Package org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover

Class ProofTreeNode

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.ProofTreeNode
All Implemented Interfaces:
IProofSkeleton, IProofTreeNode
public final class ProofTreeNode extends Object implements IProofTreeNode
Implementation of IProofTreeNode

  • Field Details

    • NO_NODE

      private static final ProofTreeNode[] NO_NODE

    • sequent

      private final IProverSequent sequent
      Sequent associated to this proof tree node. This field is immutable and always non-null.

    • children

      private ProofTreeNode[] children
      Children nodes of this proof tree node. This field may be changed in a controlled way using methods in this class. This field is equal to null iff rule equals null.

    • rule

      private ProofRule rule
      Rule applied to this proof tree node. This field may be changed in a controlled way using methods in this class. This field is equal to null iff children equals null.

    • comment

      private String comment
      Comment associated to this proof tree node.

    • parent

      private ProofTreeNode parent
      Parent node of this proof tree node.

    • confidence

      private int confidence
      Confidence level (see @see IConfidence) for this proof tree node. Although it is possible to calculate the confidence for a node, this information is cached here for greater efficiency.

    • proofTree

      private ProofTree proofTree
      Proof tree to which this node belongs. This field is only set for a root node, so that it's easy to remove a whole subtree from the tree. Always use getProofTree() to access this information.

  • Constructor Details

    • ProofTreeNode

      public ProofTreeNode(ProofTree proofTree, IProverSequent sequent)
      Creates a root node of a proof tree.
      Parameters:
      proofTree - The proof tree to associate to
      sequent - The sequent used to construct the proof tree node

    • ProofTreeNode

      private ProofTreeNode(ProofTreeNode parent, IProverSequent sequent)
      Creates an internal node of a proof tree.
      Parameters:
      parent - The parent node for the proof tree node to construct
      sequent - The sequent used to construct the proof tree node

    • ProofTreeNode

      private ProofTreeNode(ProofTreeNode node)
      Copy constructor
      Parameters:
      node - node to copy

  • Method Details

    • copySubTree

      public ProofTree copySubTree()
      Description copied from interface: IProofTreeNode
      Copies the sub proof tree rooted at the current node and returns a new proof tree corresponding to this sub tree
      Specified by:
      copySubTree in interface IProofTreeNode
      Returns:
      A new proof tree with the root identical to the current node

    • copyProofSkeleton

      public IProofSkeleton copyProofSkeleton()
      Description copied from interface: IProofTreeNode
      Extracts the proof skeleton rooted in the current node and returns it. The returned skeleton is then independent of the proof tree of this node: it will not be affected by modifications of this proof tree.
      Specified by:
      copyProofSkeleton in interface IProofTreeNode
      Returns:
      A new proof skeleton rooted at this node

    • appendOpenDescendants

      private void appendOpenDescendants(List<IProofTreeNode> list)
      Append the open descendants of this node to the given list.
      Parameters:
      list - The list of open decendants to append to

    • applyRule

      public boolean applyRule(IProofRule proofRule)
      Description copied from interface: IProofTreeNode
      Applies the given rule to this node.

      Note that outside the sequent prover, tactics provide a more uniform way to modify proof tree nodes and should be used instead of directly calling this method.

      Specified by:
      applyRule in interface IProofTreeNode
      Parameters:
      proofRule - the rule to apply to this node
      Returns:
      true iff the application of the rule succeeded

    • minChildConf

      private int minChildConf()
      Calculates the minimum confidence value of all of this node's children
      Returns:
      The minimum confidence value of all of this node's children

    • childrenChanged

      private void childrenChanged()
      Report children change to delta processor.

    • fireDeltas

      private void fireDeltas()
      Fire deltas for the associated proof tree.

    • getChildNodes

      public ProofTreeNode[] getChildNodes()
      Description copied from interface: IProofTreeNode
      Returns the children of this node.

      This method always returns an array, even if this node is a leaf node (that is with no rule applied to it). It never returns null.

      Specified by:
      getChildNodes in interface IProofSkeleton
      Specified by:
      getChildNodes in interface IProofTreeNode
      Returns:
      an array of the children of this node
      See Also:
      • IProofTreeNode.hasChildren()

    • getFirstOpenDescendant

      public IProofTreeNode getFirstOpenDescendant()
      Description copied from interface: IProofTreeNode
      Returns the first open descendant of this node.

      The first open descendant is selected quite arbitrarily by traversing the proof subtree rooted at this node depth-first.

      This node is considered a descendant of itself. Hence, calling this method on an open node returns the open node itself.

      Specified by:
      getFirstOpenDescendant in interface IProofTreeNode
      Returns:
      an open descendant of this node or null if this node has been discharged
      See Also:
      • IProofTreeNode.getOpenDescendants()

    • getNextOpenNode

      public IProofTreeNode getNextOpenNode()
      Description copied from interface: IProofTreeNode
      Returns the next open node encountered when traversing the proof tree of this node in preorder.

      If this node is already open, it will be returned. Otherwise, this method will traverse the proof tree to which this node belongs, in preorder and return the first open node encountered after traversing this node.

      Specified by:
      getNextOpenNode in interface IProofTreeNode
      Returns:
      the next open node after this node in preorder or null if this node has been discharged
      See Also:
      • IProofTreeNode.getFirstOpenDescendant()

    • getOpenDescendants

      public IProofTreeNode[] getOpenDescendants()
      Description copied from interface: IProofTreeNode
      Returns all open descendants of this node.

      This method always returns an array, even if this node has been discharged (that is has no open descendants). It never returns null.

      This node is considered a descendant of itself. Hence, calling this method on an open node returns an array containing one element: the open node itself.

      Clients should not use this method if they're interested only in an arbitrary open descendant. In that latter case, clients should call IProofTreeNode.getFirstOpenDescendant().

      Specified by:
      getOpenDescendants in interface IProofTreeNode
      Returns:
      an array of all open descendants of this node
      See Also:
      • IProofTreeNode.getFirstOpenDescendant()

    • getParent

      public IProofTreeNode getParent()
      Description copied from interface: IProofTreeNode
      Returns the parent of this proof tree node, or null if this node is the root of its proof tree.
      Specified by:
      getParent in interface IProofTreeNode
      Returns:
      the parent of this node or null

    • getProofTree

      public ProofTree getProofTree()
      Description copied from interface: IProofTreeNode
      Returns the proof tree to which this node belongs.

      Note that a node that has been pruned out of the proof tree doesn't belong anymore to it. Hence, this method will return null if this node is not connected anymore to a proof tree.

      Specified by:
      getProofTree in interface IProofTreeNode
      Returns:
      the proof tree of this node or null

    • getRule

      public IProofRule getRule()
      Description copied from interface: IProofTreeNode
      Returns the rule applied to this node.
      Specified by:
      getRule in interface IProofSkeleton
      Specified by:
      getRule in interface IProofTreeNode
      Returns:
      the rule applied to this node or null is this node is a leaf node

    • getRuleConfidence

      public int getRuleConfidence()
      Description copied from interface: IProofTreeNode
      Returns the confidence of the rule applied to this node or PENDING if this node is open.
      Specified by:
      getRuleConfidence in interface IProofTreeNode
      Returns:
      the confidence of the rule applied to this node or PENDING if this node is a leaf node

    • getSequent

      public IProverSequent getSequent()
      Description copied from interface: IProofTreeNode
      Returns the proof sequent associated to this node.
      Specified by:
      getSequent in interface IProofTreeNode
      Returns:
      the proof sequent of this node

    • hasChildren

      public boolean hasChildren()
      Description copied from interface: IProofTreeNode
      Tells whether this node has any children.

      Returns identical information to getChildren().length != 0, but is implemented in a more efficient way.

      Specified by:
      hasChildren in interface IProofTreeNode
      Returns:
      true iff this node has some child
      See Also:
      • IProofTreeNode.getChildNodes()

    • isClosed

      public boolean isClosed()
      Description copied from interface: IProofTreeNode
      Tells whether this node is closed.
      Specified by:
      isClosed in interface IProofTreeNode
      Returns:
      true iff this node is closed

    • isOpen

      public boolean isOpen()
      Description copied from interface: IProofTreeNode
      Tells whether this node is open.
      Specified by:
      isOpen in interface IProofTreeNode
      Returns:
      true iff this node is open (no rule applied to it)

    • pruneChildren

      public ProofTree[] pruneChildren()
      Description copied from interface: IProofTreeNode
      Prune the children of this node, undoing the result of applying a rule to this node. Has no effect if no rule was currently applied to this node.

      Note that outside the sequent prover, tactics provide a more uniform way to modify proof tree nodes and should be used instead of directly calling this method.

      Specified by:
      pruneChildren in interface IProofTreeNode
      Returns:
      the child subtrees that have been pruned, or null if no rule was applied to this node.
      See Also:
      • ITactic

    • reopen

      private void reopen()
      Reopen this node, setting the status of all ancestors to pending

      private void setChildren(ProofTreeNode[] newChildren)

    • setRule

      private void setRule(ProofRule newRule)

    • setProofTree

      protected void setProofTree(ProofTree tree)

    • setClosed

      private void setClosed()
      This node has just been closed. Update its status, as well as its ancestors'.

    • ruleChanged

      private void ruleChanged()
      Report a rule change to delta processor.

    • confidenceChanged

      private void confidenceChanged()
      Report a confidence level change to delta processor.

    • commentChanged

      private void commentChanged()
      Report a comment change to the delta processor.

      Sets the comment field of the current proof tree node.

      Parameters:
      comment - The new comment for the current proof tree node
      See Also:
      • IProofTreeNode.getComment()

      Description copied from interface: IProofTreeNode
      Returns the comment field of the current proof tree node.
      Specified by:
      getComment in interface IProofSkeleton
      Specified by:
      getComment in interface IProofTreeNode
      Returns:
      The comment field of the current proof tree node.

    • computeProofDeps

      public ProofDependenciesBuilder computeProofDeps()

    • getConfidence

      public int getConfidence()
      Description copied from interface: IProofTreeNode
      Returns the confidence of this proof tree node.
      Specified by:
      getConfidence in interface IProofTreeNode
      Returns:
      the confidence of this proof tree node (see IConfidence)

    • classInvariant

      private boolean classInvariant()
      Checks that the class invariant for the proof tree node and its children holds. Used for runtime assertion check for the proof tree data structure.
      Returns:
      true iff the the class invariant for the proof tree node and its children holds.

    • computedConfidence

      private int computedConfidence()
      Computes the confidence level of the proof tree node recursively.

      Used in the assertion check to check if the actual and cached confidence level are the same.

      Returns:
      The computed confidence level

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object

    • toStringHelper

      private void toStringHelper(String indent, boolean justBranched, StringBuilder str)

    • rootToString

      private String rootToString()

    • iterator

      private Iterator<IProofTreeNode> iterator(boolean rootIncluded)

    • getNextNode

      public IProofTreeNode getNextNode(boolean rootIncluded, IProofTreeNodeFilter filter)
      Description copied from interface: IProofTreeNode
      Returns the next node with satisfies the filter encountered when traversing the proof tree of this node in preorder. The flag rootIncluded indicate if the current node should be included or not.

      If rootIncluded is true and if this node satisfies the filter, it will be returned. Otherwise, this method will traverse the proof tree to which this node belongs, in preorder and return the first node satisfies the filter encountered after traversing this node.

      Specified by:
      getNextNode in interface IProofTreeNode
      Parameters:
      rootIncluded - the boolean flag to indicate if the current not should be considered or not
      filter - a proof tree node filter
      Returns:
      the next node satisfies the input filter after this node in preorder or null if there is no such node.

    • getFormulaFactory

      public FormulaFactory getFormulaFactory()
      Description copied from interface: IProofTreeNode
      Returns the formula factory used by the sequent of this proof tree node
      Specified by:
      getFormulaFactory in interface IProofTreeNode
      Returns:
      the formula factory to use
